item.title: Will Our Old John Deere Start Again?
item.description: Laura Farms checks whether their old John Deere will start again, sharing a real farm moment with machinery, patience, and determination.

media:content.media:title: Will Our Old John Deere Start Again?
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms checks whether their old John Deere will start again, sharing a real farm moment with machinery, patience, and determination.

item.title: Be Careful Please!
item.description: Laura Farms shares a simple reminder to stay careful while working on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Be Careful Please!
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a simple reminder to stay careful while working on the farm.

item.title: Saving the Road from a Wayward Pivot
item.description: Laura Farms works to save the road from a wayward pivot, showing the kind of hands-on problem solving and teamwork that keeps farm life moving.

media:content.media:title: Saving the Road from a Wayward Pivot
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms works to save the road from a wayward pivot, showing the kind of hands-on problem solving and teamwork that keeps farm life moving.

item.title: Driving as Many Tractors as I Can in 24 Hours
item.description: Laura Farms takes on a full day of tractor driving, showing the pace, focus, and hands-on work that keep the farm moving.

media:content.media:title: Driving as Many Tractors as I Can in 24 Hours
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on a full day of tractor driving, showing the pace, focus, and hands-on work that keep the farm moving.

item.title: Fixing Our Pivot Repair Rig
item.description: Laura Farms works on fixing the pivot repair rig, keeping farm equipment ready for the job and showing the hands-on work behind daily life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Fixing Our Pivot Repair Rig
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms works on fixing the pivot repair rig, keeping farm equipment ready for the job and showing the hands-on work behind daily life on the farm.

item.title: Big Farm Equipment on Display
item.description: Laura Farms shares a look at some of the biggest farm equipment around, highlighting the scale and power of life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Big Farm Equipment on Display
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a look at some of the biggest farm equipment around, highlighting the scale and power of life on the farm.

item.title: Keeping Up with the Harvest
item.description: Laura Farms keeps pace with harvest time in this farm-life moment, showing the steady work and teamwork that go into getting the crop in.

media:content.media:title: Keeping Up with the Harvest
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms keeps pace with harvest time in this farm-life moment, showing the steady work and teamwork that go into getting the crop in.

item.title: Quick Pit Stop on the Farm
item.description: A quick pit stop during the day on the farm, keeping things moving and ready for the next job.

media:content.media:title: Quick Pit Stop on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A quick pit stop during the day on the farm, keeping things moving and ready for the next job.

item.title: Facing a Fear on the Farm
item.description: Laura Farms shares a personal moment of pushing past a fear of heights and getting it done.

media:content.media:title: Facing a Fear on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a personal moment of pushing past a fear of heights and getting it done.

item.title: Harvesting Soybeans with Big Equipment
item.description: Laura Farms takes on soybean harvest with big equipment, showing the steady work and teamwork that keep the farm moving.

media:content.media:title: Harvesting Soybeans with Big Equipment
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on soybean harvest with big equipment, showing the steady work and teamwork that keep the farm moving.

item.title: Farmers Making It Rain on the Farm
item.description: Farmers keep the work moving with tractors and muddy field conditions, showing teamwork, determination, and daily life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Farmers Making It Rain on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Farmers keep the work moving with tractors and muddy field conditions, showing teamwork, determination, and daily life on the farm.
